info.title: Galactic Tycoons Public API
info.description:
## Public API for Galactic Tycoons

Access game data programmatically to build tools and integrations.

All endpoints have a **cost** measured in points. Requests with an API key are allocated **500 points per 10-minute window** per user.
🌐Public endpoints are accessible without an API key, but requests without an API key are limited to **200 points per 10-minute window**. It is recommended to use an API key for all requests.

API keys can be provided either as a query parameter or as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

Example API request:

https://api.g2.galactictycoons.com/public/company?apikey=YOUR_API_KEY

For more information, visit the [API Wiki Page](https://wiki.galactictycoons.com/api/overview).

get.summary: 🌐 Public | Get public information about any company
🔑 Limited | Get detailed information about your company
🔑 Limited | Get detailed information about all your bases
🔑 Limited | Get detailed information about a specific base
🔑 Limited | Get detailed information about all your warehouses
🔑 Limited | Get detailed information about a specific warehouse
🔑 Limited | Get all your exchange offers
🔑 Limited | Get latest credits change history for your company
🔑 Limited | Get your company's trade contracts
get.description:
Returns pending and active trade contracts associated with your company.  

**Rate Limit Cost:** 8 points  
**Required Access Level:** 🔑Limited

get.summary: 🌐 Public | Get paginated list of top companies by prestige rank
get.description:
Returns companies sorted by prestige (highest first). Use startFromRank and pageSize to paginate through the leaderboard.  

**Rate Limit Cost:** 25 points  
**Required Access Level:** 🌐Public

parameters.name: startFromRank
parameters.description: Starting rank position (1 = top company, default: 1)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of companies to return (1-100, default: 25)

get.summary: 🌐 Public | Get current exchange prices for all materials
🌐 Public | Get current exchange price for a specific material

parameters.name: materialId
parameters.description: Material ID to get price for

get.summary: 🌐 Public | Get detailed information for all materials including orders, supply and stats
🌐 Public | Get detailed information for a specific material including orders, supply and stats

parameters.name: materialId
parameters.description: Material ID to get details for

get.summary: 🌐 Public | Get public information about any guild
🔑 Limited | Get details about your guild
🔐 Extended | Get donation history for your guild's projects
get.description:
Returns up to 200 most recent donations older than the specified lastId (for pagination).
If lastId is not provided, the most recent donations are returned.  

**Rate Limit Cost:** 25 points  
**Required Access Level:** 🔐Extended

parameters.name: lastId
parameters.description: Get donations older than this ID. Leave empty to get most recent donations.

get.summary: 🌐 Public | Get paginated list of top guilds by prestige rank
get.description:
Returns guilds sorted by prestige (highest first). Use startFromRank and pageSize to paginate through the leaderboard.  

**Rate Limit Cost:** 22 points  
**Required Access Level:** 🌐Public

parameters.name: startFromRank
parameters.description: Starting rank position (1 = top guild, default: 1)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of guilds to return (1-100, default: 100)

get.summary: 🔑 Limited | Get all your company's wishlists
🔑 Limited | Get a specific wishlist by id

delete.description:
Deletes an existing wishlist.  

**Rate Limit Cost:** 30 points  
**Required Access Level:** 🔐Extended

post.summary: 🔐 Extended | Add or subtract materials from existing wishlist
post.description:
Adds/subtracts the specified amounts of materials. 
If the resulting amount is 0 or negative, the material is removed.
Planet wishlist is automatically created when first adding materials to a planet wishlist.
Returns the updated wishlist.  

**Rate Limit Cost:** 10 points  
**Required Access Level:** 🔐Extended

parameters.name: wishlistId
parameters.description: Planet ID or existing custom wishlist ID

post.summary: 🔐 Extended | Create a new custom wishlist
post.description:
Creates a new custom wishlist with the specified title and items. 
Custom wishlists have IDs above 50,000,000.
Returns the newly created wishlist.  

**Rate Limit Cost:** 30 points  
**Required Access Level:** 🔐Extended

Renames an existing custom wishlist (Planet wishlists cannot be renamed).
Returns the updated wishlist.  

**Rate Limit Cost:** 15 points  
**Required Access Level:** 🔐Extended

buffer.description: Extra amount eaten last update date

exp.description: How many slot expansions have been added to this base

materials.description: Materials stored in the project (includes both for construction and consumption)

otherCompany.description: Other Company involved in the transaction

unitPrice.description: Cash change per unit in cents; Value is always positive; Types 100>= are negative cash changes

value.description: Total value of the company in credits

wf.description: Total workforce count (all workforce in all bases combined)

fDate.description: Date when the company was founded

lastSeen.description: Date when this company was last seen online; Returns current date for online companies

ic.description: Company logo as base64 string (custom format)

gId.description: Guild ID, 0 if not in a guild

gTag.description: Guild tag (Empty string if not in a guild)

bases.description: List of planet IDs where the company has bases

ic.description: Company logo as base64 string (custom format)

gId.description: Guild ID (0 if not in a guild)

gTag.description: Guild tag (Empty string if not in a guild)

lastSeen.description: Date when this company was last seen online; Returns current date for online companies

fDate.description: Date when the company was founded

wf.description: Total workforce count (all workforce in all bases combined)

basesC.description: Number of bases owned - Deprecated field, use bases array length instead

bases.description: List of planet IDs where the company has bases

currentPrice.description: Current lowest price on exchange in cents (-1 if no orders available)

avgPrice.description: Average price from recent trades in cents (-1 if no trade history)

totalQtyAvailable.description: Total quantity available for sale (excluding Fed orders)

orders.description: Active sell orders sorted by price (cheapest first, includes Fed orders)

avgQtySoldDaily.description: Average quantity sold per day (excluding Fed purchases from players)

priceHistory.description: Price history for the last 30 days (index 0 = today)

currentPrice.description: Current lowest price on exchange in cents (-1 if no orders available)

avgPrice.description: Average price from recent trades in cents (-1 if no trade history)

qtyTot.description: Total quantity originally posted in the order

uId.description: User ID (company ID) of the owner - Deprecated, use cId instead)

qRem.description: Remaining quantity - Deprecated, use qty instead

price.description: Price per unit in cents - Deprecated, use unitPrice instead

qTot.description: Total quantity - Deprecated, use qtyTot instead

avgPrice.description: Average traded price for this day in cents (excludes contracts)

qtySold.description: Quantity sold this day (excluding Fed purchases)

qtyRemaining.description: Quantity remaining at end of day (excluding Fed orders)

qtyC.description: Quantity traded via contracts on this day

fDate.description: Date when the guild was founded

type.description: Project type that received the donation

date.description: DateTime when the donation was made

value.description: Total value of the company in credits

lastSeen.description: Date when this company was last seen online; Returns current date for online companies

fDate.description: Date when the guild was founded

rank.description: Rank of the company in prestige leaderboard

perks.description: Allocated perks; null if no perks

poSlots.description: Number of unlocked production order slots

fDate.description: Date when the company was founded

gId.description: Guild ID, 0 if not in a guild

value.description: Total value of the company in credits

fDate.description: Date when the guild was founded

invited.description: Companies invited to join the guild

requestedJoins.description: Companies that requested to join the guild

projects.description: Guild building projects (full details for members)

amt.description: How many times to produce the recipe; 65535 = infinite production order

recipeId.description: Recipe Id - Old field, use rId

updD.description: Date when production was last updated

updPart.description: Part of the task completed at last update

mul.description: Amount multiplier (both input and output, level 2 building produces 2x)

startFuel.description: Fuel at the start of the flight

arrivalFuel.description: Fuel at the end of the flight

pId.description: Planet ID where the ship is currently located OR is traveling from

flight.description: Current flight information, null if stationary

pId.description: Planet ID where the contract is executed

unitPrice.description: Price per unit in cents (includes fees)

unitFee.description: Fee per unit in cents (included in UnitPrice)

aDate.description: Date when the contract was created

cDate.description: Date when contract was Accepted/Filled/Canceled (date of last status change)

state.description: Current fulfillability state; null if not applicable

fLimit.description: How many times the recurring contract can be fulfilled in a day (null if not a recurring contract)

ftotal.description: How many times was this contract fulfilled in total.

fToday.description: How many times was the recurring contract fulfilled today (null if not a recurring contract)

expires.description: For recurring contracts, the date until which the contract is active.

hasSpace.description: Whether buyer has enough warehouse space

holderId.description: Entity ID holding this warehouse: Base.Id when Type=1, Ship.Id when Type=2, otherwise 0

title.description: Wishlist title, null for planet wishlists

Bearer.description: Enter your API key as a bearer token
